screen.grand_builder.title: Builder Console
screen.grand_builder.subtitle: Preview, confirm, build, save custom structures.
screen.grand_builder.hint: Custom: Selector LMB/RMB = corners A/B, then Save Custom.
screen.grand_builder.hint_preview: Preview: bright frame = full bounds, glow corners = exact size.

message.grand_builder.already_running: A build animation is already running.
message.grand_builder.custom_missing: Capture your custom structure first from the Builder Console.
message.grand_builder.capture_empty: No non-air blocks found in the capture area.
message.grand_builder.capture_saved_limi: Custom structure saved with limit: %s / %s blocks.
message.grand_builder.no_active_build: There is no active build right now.
message.grand_builder.status_waiting_chu: %s: %s%%, %s blocks left, waiting for loaded chunks.
message.grand_builder.preview_missing: No prepared preview found. Open the menu and create preview first.
message.grand_builder.preview_canceled_h: Preview canceled: Builder Core is no longer in your hands.
message.grand_builder.confirm_requires_s: Hold Shift while confirming preview to prevent accidental starts.
message.grand_builder.rollback_missing: No build data available for rollback.
message.grand_builder.rollback_requires_: Hold Shift before rollback for safety.
message.grand_builder.rollback_confirm: Run rollback again within a few seconds to confirm.
message.grand_builder.rollback_confirm_n: Rollback safety: press rollback again to confirm (works from GUI without Shift).
message.grand_builder.limit_radius: Build exceeds max radius (%s blocks from player).
message.grand_builder.bounds_height: Build would exceed world height limits.
message.grand_builder.concurrent_limit: Server build queue is full (max %s active builds).
message.grand_builder.no_permission: You do not have permission to use Grand Builder here.
message.grand_builder.dimension_blocked: Grand Builder is disabled in this dimension.
message.grand_builder.core_required: Builder Core must be in hand to run this action.
message.grand_builder.cooldown: Action cooldown: please wait a moment.
message.grand_builder.waiting_chunks: Build is waiting for chunks to load.
message.grand_builder.onboarding: Tip: Start with Preview, then confirm with Shift + right-click/Enter.
message.grand_builder.client_hint: Grand Builder tool detected: press B to open Builder Console.
command.grand_builder.status: Grand Builder: max blocks %s, max radius %s, permission mode %s
tooltip.grand_builder.structure_selector: Hold it to see the selection outline, then save in Builder Console
message.grand_builder.selection_ready: Selection ready: %sx%sx%s (%s blocks). Hold Builder Selector to see the outline.
message.grand_builder.selection_required: Select two corners first with the Builder Selector, then press Save Custom.
message.grand_builder.selection_wrong_di: Selection is in another dimension. Set both corners again here.
message.grand_builder.selection_too_larg: Selection too large: %s blocks (max %s). Increase maxCaptureBlocks if you really need this.
message.grand_builder.capture_unloaded_c: Capture canceled: part of the selection is in unloaded chunks.
message.grand_builder.capture_export_fai: Custom structure was saved for this session, but file export failed. Check the server log.
message.grand_builder.capture_tool_requi: Hold Builder Core or Builder Selector to save a custom structure.
